jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at NSE
jsonLd.description:
We at NSE are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NSE:
NSE is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE!
